facebook.content: I know it's easy to get caught up in worries about the future, but here's the thing: God has already given you everything you need. It's in the present, not the possibilities. The strength of your life is not in your strength, but in His. You are not a product of your circumstances, you are a child of God, and His power is made perfect in your weakness.
facebook.cta:

facebook.fullPost:
I know it's easy to get caught up in worries about the future, but here's the thing: God has already given you everything you need. It's in the present, not the possibilities. The strength of your life is not in your strength, but in His. You are not a product of your circumstances, you are a child of God, and His power is made perfect in your weakness.

facebook.pullQuote: The strength of your life is not in your strength, but in His.

instagram.content:
"When you're feeling overwhelmed, don't forget who's with you. I'm with you. God is with you. Your past doesn't dictate your present. Your future is brighter than your past. 

You got this. You've been prepared for this moment. Your strength isn't in your flesh, it's in the Lord.

Double tap if you're ready to rise above your challenges."

tiktok.content: When I see the enemy trying to steal your harvest, I want you to remember one thing: it ain't your harvest. You didn't sow it, you can't reap it. Your life has more than enough because God's got more than enough, period. So don't let the enemy make you feel like you're not worthy of it.

When I see the enemy trying to steal your harvest, I want you to remember one thing: it ain't your harvest. You didn't sow it, you can't reap it. Your life has more than enough because God's got more than enough, period. So don't let the enemy make you feel like you're not worthy of it.
